source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
A horizontally placed cylinder has an opening at its left end, and the length of the inner wall of the cylinder is $2L$. A piston can only move inside the cylinder, and the right side of the piston is sealed with a certain mass of ideal gas. The thickness of the piston and all friction are negligible, and both the piston and the cylinder are adiabatic. Initially, the piston is at a distance of $L$ from the right end of the cylinder, the external atmospheric pressure is $1.0 \times 10^{5} \mathrm{Pa}$, and the temperature is $27^{\circ}\mathbf{C}$. The sealed gas is now slowly heated using an electric heating wire.

1. What is the distance of the piston from the right end of the cylinder when heated to $227^{\circ}\mathrm{C}$?
2. What is the pressure of the enclosed gas in the cylinder when heated to $527^{\circ}\mathrm{C}$?

image_dependency: 输入字段显示 requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false，说明上游标注认为该题对图像有较明显依赖。
asset_registry_record 中存在 1 张主图像，且 registry_passed=true，图像资产可用。
题干涉及圆筒、活塞、左右端、长度关系等空间设置，示意图有助于理解位置与运动方向；但题干文字本身也给出了主要物理条件，因此不是满分依赖。
multi_step: 题目包含两个子问，分别要求 227°C 和 527°C 时的不同物理量，不是单步直接求值。
从题干可见需要结合理想气体、缓慢加热、外界大气压、活塞在有限长度圆筒内运动等条件进行分阶段推理。
答案包含两个推导结果（一个位置、一个压强），说明需要连续状态分析而非简单读取。
verifiability: answer_type=short_text，且 answer_present=true，目标答案为封闭形式数值/表达式，便于核验。
两个结果分别是长度比例和压强数值，均可通过标准物理公式独立复算。
asset_registry_record 中 registry_passed=true 且 issues 为空，样本完整性较好。

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和主图像资产均存在，且 registry_passed=true、issues 为空，样本完整性好。
initial_scoring_record 显示 multi_step_score=0.9、verifiability_score=0.95，说明该题具有较好的推理价值和可核验性。
虽然存在 image_dependency_uncertain_from_text 和 multi_part_short_text_answer 风险标记，但当前并非资产缺失或核心语义不足，因此不构成降为低优先级或拒绝的充分理由。

asset_records.source_text_snapshot:
A horizontally placed cylinder has an opening at its left end, and the length of the inner wall of the cylinder is $2L$. A piston can only move inside the cylinder, and the right side of the piston is sealed with a certain mass of ideal gas. The thickness of the piston and all friction are negligible, and both the piston and the cylinder are adiabatic. Initially, the piston is at a distance of $L$ from the right end of the cylinder, the external atmospheric pressure is $1.0 \times 10^{5} \mathrm{Pa}$, and the temperature is $27^{\circ}\mathbf{C}$. The sealed gas is now slowly heated using an electric heating wire.

1. What is the distance of the piston from the right end of the cylinder when heated to $227^{\circ}\mathrm{C}$?
2. What is the pressure of the enclosed gas in the cylinder when heated to $527^{\circ}\mathrm{C}$?
